Exam/Concept.title: AnKang Notes Help
Exam/Concept.body:
Make Books for different Blocks or Organ Systems.
Make Chapters for different Exams or Concepts.
Make Notes for a fact or something inside that piece of info.
Or do something completely different!

You can also link specific Anki Cards to different notes by highlighting and right clicking text on an anki card.

AnKang Notes is still a little buggy, make sure to not save anything too important that you're scared to lose.
Will EVENTUALLY update AnKang Notes with more features!
